contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: @⁨Kaon⁩ 
  
  Can you expose the experiential learning system on a URL so that I can start using it for the experience we plan to offer to the community during my upcoming visit in China 
  
  This dogfooding will surface edge cases in your system which will help improve it thanks 
  
  Let me know when it can be ready 😊🙏
  
  Web app
  
  I pass prompt it saying I want to create a set of lesson for cacao
  
  The various context the lesson will be conducted in
  
  As well as upload a bunch of videos (_I can connect my YouTube account with it_)
  
  It uploads the videos and fetches the links and then embeds in a lesson package
  
  Similar to capoeira.agroverse.shop
  
  And of course, the activities as well for example, a learning experience could be structured as 70% activities and 30% theoretical learning, though the ratio can vary depending on the specific experience.
  
  Don’t bother over optimizing 
  
  Send me the url and let me give it a test run 
  
  My sense is some other parameters will end up surfacing and becoming more important 😊🙏
  
  Make sure it allows me to connect my YouTube account and my GitHub account and then use those to upload the generated materials one I click on publish
  
  Also make sure it allows me to choose, which particular GitHub repository I want the experience materials to be published to
  
  And also every time I publish it updates the github repo I associated with it 
  
  I’m gonna publish that github repository as a  GitHub page
  
  This is an example of my conversations with Sophia
  
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot_transcript
  
  In case she fails, I could always spin up another LLM to parse through our conversation and then continue from there
  
  A partial solution has a lot of rough edges and sometimes might accidentally scratch a user. 
  
  In a holistic solution walls between the user and the solution disappears… 
  
  It cannot be directly arrived at through pure cognition but instead via the path of an infinite cosmic dance between man and machine to such an extend everything blurs into one at which point it is hard to decipher at which point does the boundary of the user ends and the boundary of the solution begins
  
  Okay tomorrow evening I will! 
  Wich means tomorrow morning for you.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Kaon Krasniqi
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: IMG_2180.png
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/contribution_20260603204651_gary_teh_img_2180.png
--------

My Digital Signature: 

Request Transaction ID: 

This submission was generated using https://dapp.truesight.me/report_contribution.html

Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
